acquisition method: The mass spectrometer was operated in the data-dependent acquisition mode (DDA).
alkylation reagent: alkylated in 55 mM iodoacetamide and 100 mM ammonium bicarbonate for 45 min at room temperature in the dark
cleavage agent: assuming digestion by trypsin with up to 2 missed cleavage sites.
collision energy: subjected to fragmentation in the HCD mode at a normalised collision energy of 25.
fragmentation method: subjected to fragmentation in the HCD mode
instrument: mass spectrometer was operated in the data-dependent acquisition mode (DDA) using a Q Exactive hybrid quadrupole-Orbitrap mass spectrometer.
ionization type: through an EASY-Spray nano-electrospray ionization (nano-ESI) source.
labeling: quantified across all 10 TMT quantification channels.
reduction reagent: reduced in 10 mM DTT and 100 mM ammonium bicarbonate solution.
